title: US launches heaviest strikes against Iran since ceasefire
gist: The US launched its heaviest strikes against Iran since the ceasefire, with Iran reporting a projectile hit near the Bushehr nuclear plant and Kuwait reporting one injury.

insights.claim: The US launched its heaviest strikes against Iran since the ceasefire.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Confirms sharp escalation, keeping Gulf risk premia elevated.

insights.claim: Iran reported a projectile hit near the Bushehr nuclear plant.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Strikes near a nuclear facility raise tail-risk of radiological or major-escalation events.
insights.locator: Kuwait said one person was injured

insights.claim: Kuwait said one person was injured in a strike.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Spillover onto Gulf states signals widening conflict footprint.
insights.locator: Kuwait said one person was injured
